name: create_animator_controller
description: Creates a new AnimatorController asset (.controller) at the given path, with optional initial states and parameters.

path.description: Asset path for the new controller, e.g. 'Assets/Animations/Player.controller'.

parameters.description: Optional JSON array of parameters to add: [{"name":"Speed","type":"Float"},{"name":"IsGrounded","type":"Bool"},{"name":"Jump","type":"Trigger"},{"name":"Health","type":"Int"}]. Types: Float, Int, Bool, Trigger.

states.description: Optional JSON array of states to add to the base layer: [{"name":"Idle"},{"name":"Run"},{"name":"Jump"}].
